label_verbatim: (Name of Limited Liability Partnership in Jurisdiction of Organization) — top-of-form identifier
rationale: Top-of-form recital widget reciting the foreign LLP's name as it currently appears on the SOS record (used to locate the existing record being amended). Matches the on_record/new convention from CORP_MBCA-12A: top-of-form holds the on-record name, FIRST holds the post-amendment name.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the limited liability partnership in its jurisdiction of organization has been changed to ___ (If no change, so indicate.)
rationale: NEW home-jurisdiction name post-amendment. May contain literal 'No change' (or be left empty per the form's 'If no change, so indicate' convention).

label_verbatim: SECOND: If the real limited liability partnership name is not available, the fictitious name under which it proposes to apply for authority to do business in the State of Maine is ___ (If applicable, so indicate.)
rationale: Fictitious Maine name (per 31 MRSA §803-A). Same key as MLLC-12 / FICT-4.

label_verbatim: [ ] Form FICT-4 accompanies this application.
rationale: Boolean indicating Form FICT-4 (fictitious name registration) is bundled. Reuses MLLC-12 / MBCA-12 convention.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The nature of the business or purposes to be conducted or promoted in the State of Maine is ___ (If no change, so indicate.)
rationale: Free-text Maine-business-purpose statement. Same key as MLLC-12. May contain 'No change' literal.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The new address of the registered or principal office, wherever located, is: (If no change, so indicate.) (physical location - street (not P.O. Box), city, state and zip code)
rationale: NEW physical address of the principal office (single-line, no P.O. Box). Same key as MLLC-12 / MBCA-12.

label_verbatim: (mailing address if different from above)
rationale: Optional mailing address of the principal office. Same key as MLLC-12 / MBCA-12.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The name and or the business, residence or mailing address of the contact partner has been changed to: (If no change, so indicate.) — Name
rationale: NEW name of the LLP's contact partner. Same key as MLLP-1's contact_partner.name (single-row variant — MLLP-12A doesn't show an additional-partners overflow checkbox).

label_verbatim: FIFTH: ...Address
rationale: NEW address of the contact partner. Single-line combined business/residence/mailing address.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: Other amendments to the application, if any, are set forth in Exhibit ___ attached hereto and made a part hereof.
rationale: Catch-all exhibit letter for other amendments not captured by FIRST–FIFTH. Reuses LP_MLPA-12A / CORP_MBCA-12A convention (preferred over the proposed-but-unused 'additional_amendments_exhibit_letter' alias).

label_verbatim: DATED ___
Partner(s)* (signature) — (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Individual-partner signer printed name + capacity. Shape D. Used when an individual partner signs (option (1) of the footnote: 'at least one partner').

label_verbatim: For Partner(s) which are Entities — Name of Entity
rationale: Name of an entity-partner when the signer is itself a corporate/LLC partner. Same key as GP_MPA-1, LLP_MLLP-17 entity-signer block.

label_verbatim: For Partner(s) which are Entities — By ___ (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity of the natural person signing on behalf of the entity-partner. Same primitive as filing.signer.printed_name_and_capacity but scoped under filing.signer_entity to indicate the signer acts for an entity-partner.
